roa.docketEntryComment: CONFIDENTIAL Application for Court Appointed Counsel
DEFT REQ TO ADD TO CALENDAR FOR DISPOSITION /PLEA FILED

/CAL: REQUEST TO ADD TO CALENDAR FOR DISPOSITION OR PLEA/INTC/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TO DISMISS THIS CASE PURSUANT TO PC 1385,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY  BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURT NO, 21005947,/VD: HEARING DATEOF 06-13-22/

/CAL: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/OC/X: TODAY'S HEARING WAS VACATED ON 06-10-22,/
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/INTC/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/LDPX: 07-25-22 (60)/
